film.title: Old School
film.overview: Three friends attempt to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity near their alma mater.

dialogues.dialogue: You look a little pale, Mitch. You need to breathe.  Let a little blood up in your face there, will ya?  - I don't want to breathe. - You should be proud of yourself.  Do you have any idea how hard it is to land a girl as sexually enlightened as Heidi is?  A girl like that comes around, what, once every hundred years?
Can't hear you!  Excuse me.  I'd like to say I'm really glad and proud to be here tonight.  I'm glad to see Frank's dad made it out. I haven't seen him in eight years.  That's great. Congratulations.

Come on, let's go. There we go, Blue.  Congratulations, gentlemen.  You should all be very proud of yourselves.  Each and every one of you has been hand-picked  to represent our inaugural pledge class.
dialogues.cause_raw: being hand-picked to represent inaugural pledge class
